nasb.text: and I said, “O my God, I am ashamed and embarrassed to lift up my face to You, my God, for our iniquities have risen above our heads and our guilt has grown even to the heavens.

esv.text: saying: “O my God, I am ashamed and blush to lift my face to you, my God, for our iniquities have risen higher than our heads, and our guilt has mounted up to the heavens.

cnv.text: 禱告說：‘我的　神啊，我感覺羞恥慚愧，不敢向我的　神你仰面；因為我們的罪孽多至滅頂，我們的罪過滔天。

ccb.text: 说：“我的上帝啊，我羞愧难当，不敢抬头看你，因为我们的恶行灭顶，我们的罪恶滔天。
